# opnsense_quagga_static (Resource)

Enables the FRR static routing subsystem on OPNsense. Singleton resource; manage individual routes with `opnsense_quagga_static_route`. Requires the `os-frr` plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable FRR static routing. Defaults to `false`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier (always `static`).
